analysis.summary: The technician performed a general system health check on a client's Windows 10 Pro computer. This involved reviewing display settings, system information, installed applications, network configuration, device drivers, event logs, running services, and Windows Update status. An internet speed test was also conducted.
actions_taken: Examined installed programs in Control Panel
Ran `ipconfig /all` in Command Prompt to check network configuration
Inspected Device Manager for hardware and driver status
Browsed System logs in Event Viewer
Performed an internet speed test using fast.com
Checked Windows Update status in Windows Settings

tech_performance.efficiency_notes: The technician worked methodically, systematically opening various system tools and checks without hesitation or apparent uncertainty. The workflow suggests a routine health check procedure was followed.
